description:
Advances: specled.realized_by

Discovered fixing main@a4bfd3b. When a function's realization intentionally changes: (1) Orchestrator.refresh_and_commit_hashes/3 is gated on has_drift?(raw findings) — severity-independent — so drift blocks the very refresh that would accept the new hash; mix spec.check can never self-heal intentional drift, contrary to what a4bfd3b's commit message assumed. (2) The Spec-Drift: branch_guard_realization_drift=info trailer only downgrades the finding while the carrying commit is inside base..HEAD; once merged (tip of main), Trailer.read sees an empty range and the drift comes back as an error forever. (3) The only working ritual is delete-the-stale-entry-and-let-silent_seed-reseed, which is sanctioned by specled.realized_by.silent_seed but documented nowhere as the acceptance flow. Consider an explicit accept mechanism (e.g. mix spec.check --accept-drift <mfa> or accepting when the run's trailer downgrades the code) plus guide documentation.

comments.text:
IMPL COMPLETE (not closed — orchestrator grades). Commit 95c5e37.

MECHANISM: mix spec.check --accept-drift (explicit, durable, auditable). Chosen over trailer-tied acceptance (implicit + inherits the trailer's base..HEAD fragility, defeating the post-merge case) and over dropping the no-drift gate (absorbs all drift every run).

WHAT CHANGED:
- lib/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator.ex: new :accept_drift? opt; do_run's refresh gate becomes (accept_drift? or not has_drift?), so refresh_and_commit_hashes/3 runs even under drift and commits current flat-tier hashes as the new baseline. Dangling never accepted (api_boundary_hashes/refresh only commit resolvable bindings). Fixes defect 1.
- lib/specled_ex/branch_check.ex: severity_opts/4 injects a run-scoped branch_guard_realization_drift => :info override at TRAILER precedence when accept_drift? is set, so the accept run passes single-shot even where config pins the code to :error (as this repo does); config :off still absorbs. Threads accept_drift? into run_realization. This is why acceptance no longer depends on the ephemeral trailer (fixes defect 2 by consequence — the baseline moves, so post-merge there is no drift).
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.check.ex: --accept-drift flag.
- .spec/realization_hashes.json: run/2 hash refreshed (the accept path exercised on this very branch — see below).

SPEC/DOCS (all additive, justified):
- realized_by.spec.md: new must specled.realized_by.drift_acceptance + 2 scenarios + tagged_tests verification (execute:true) + decision link.
- NEW decision specled.decision.realization_drift_acceptance: flag (durable, flat tiers) vs PR-scoped Spec-Drift trailer vs impl-tier delete-and-reseed; documents defect 3.
- mix_tasks.spec.md: new must specled.tasks.accept_drift_flag + verification (co-change for spec.check.ex).
- package.spec.md: extended specled.package.concepts_guide statement to require the acceptance-flow docs (co-change for docs/concepts.md).
- docs/concepts.md: 'Accepting intentional drift durably' section (3 mechanisms) — this is defect 3's fix.

TESTS (new): test/integration/drift_acceptance_test.exs (accept refreshes baseline + downgrades to :info + self-heals on next run; dangling NOT accepted, run still fails). test/mix/tasks/spec_check_accept_drift_test.exs (task-level: --accept-drift passes over a drift=error config pin and refreshes the committed hash; without it the run fails and the baseline is untouched).

VERIFICATION TIER: change-scoped. compile --warnings-as-errors OK; format --check-formatted OK; deps.unlock --check-unused OK; targeted suite 90/90 + mix tasks 27/27 + new files green; mix spec.check --no-run-commands --base origin/main = pass (exit 0), all 4 remaining findings :info (attested-clean). One finals run to green after resolving guard findings (finals_gt1: iterated on the dogfood findings).

STUBS FLIPPED: none (added new execute:true verifications; did not flip any execute:false->true).
FOLLOW-UPS: specled_-o40 (api_boundary line-sensitivity).

FOR THE COLD VERIFIER — SCRUTINIZE:
1. .spec/realization_hashes.json run/2 hash change 0415833->b3b822. This is NOT a behavior change: run/2's source is byte-identical to main. Proven line-position sensitivity — inserting 9 blank lines above run/2 on a clean main tree reproduces b3b822 exactly. My uv3 moduledoc addition shifted run/2's line and canonicalize_head leaked the position. Accepted via the new --accept-drift (dogfood). Tracked as specled_-o40.
2. severity precedence choice: --accept-drift deliberately WINS over a config :error pin (trailer-precedence injection). Rationale in the decision record — the explicit flag is a stronger one-time acknowledgment than standing config, exactly as a Spec-Drift trailer overrides config; :off still absorbs.
3. The accept run itself still emits the drift finding at :info and (for the file attested only by the drifting binding) cannot attest that file on the same run — attestation excludes drifting bindings regardless of severity. The NEXT run is clean. This is inherent and correct; the task-level test asserts the single-run PASS + baseline refresh, and the integration test asserts the next-run-clean self-heal.

VERIFY: PASS
Session: 7aeecd3d-b033-4471-a78e-42637ed6d609
Log: ~/.claude/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/7aeecd3d-b033-4471-a78e-42637ed6d609.jsonl

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched: 11
- Files outside scope: 0 (all 11 are the drift-acceptance mechanism, its specs/decision, docs/concepts.md, or its two new tests)
- Files matching out-of-scope: 0 (uv3 predates glob scope blocks; scope derived from In/Out-of-Scope prose + Advances specled.realized_by — all touches on-topic)

Semantic checks:
- Spec stubs run: 1 (new execute:true tagged_tests for specled.realized_by.drift_acceptance; no execute:false->true flips). Passed: 1. Ran `mix test test/integration/drift_acceptance_test.exs test/mix/tasks/spec_check_accept_drift_test.exs` = 3 tests, 0 failures.
- Requirements coverage:
  - specled.realized_by.drift_acceptance: covered by test/integration/drift_acceptance_test.exs:26 and :100. Would fail if the refresh stayed gated on no-drift (2nd non-accepting run would still report drift -> refute at :92-96 fails) or if a dangling binding were absorbed (assert nil at :148 / status "fail" at :144 fails). Seams: real host MFA SpecLedEx.Coverage.default_artifact_path/0 (genuine Binding.resolve, not mocked); drift manufactured by HashStore.write of a real sha256("wrong"); real git repo. Mechanism itself unmocked.
  - specled.tasks.accept_drift_flag: covered by test/mix/tasks/spec_check_accept_drift_test.exs:14. Would fail if the flag were unwired or the trailer-precedence override not injected (--accept-drift run would raise Mix.Error against the drift=error config pin at :60) or if the baseline were not refreshed (refute at :70). Seams: real Mix.Tasks.Spec.Check.run, real .spec/config.yml pinning drift=error, real host MFA.
- Intent-level scope concerns: none. All spec edits additive: realized_by gains 1 must + 2 scenarios + 1 execute:true verification; mix_tasks gains 1 must; package.concepts_guide statement EXTENDED (strengthened, not weakened); new decision record. No existing must weakened, no non-falsifiable clause added. mix.exs untouched (no new deps).
- Targeted verification: PASS. `mix test <two files>` = 3/3. `mix help spec.check` shows the --accept-drift flag + doc. Severity precedence traced in lib/specled_ex/branch_check/severity.ex:75-80: config :off absorbs (wins over trailer); trailer beats config :error. severity_opts injects branch_guard_realization_drift=>:info at trailer precedence ONLY when accept_drift? (branch_check.ex:182-186) -> no global downgrade for normal runs (Goodhart hole absent). refresh_and_commit_hashes/api_boundary_hashes only commit resolvable bindings (orchestrator.ex:915-923) -> dangling never accepted. do_run gate now (accept_drift? or not has_drift?) (orchestrator.ex:188) -> defect 1 fixed. Baseline-move durability (defect 2) proven by the self-heal assertion in the integration test.
- Corpus-scoped claims (docs/concepts.md acceptance section): 5 validated, 4 by execution. --accept-drift flag (mix help + tests), flat-tier list matches @flat_tiers/refresh, Spec-Drift trailer PR-scoped, delete-and-reseed for implementation tier (silent_seed), finding codes branch_guard_realization_drift / branch_guard_dangling_binding all real. No falsehoods.
- Full-suite verification: not run by verifier (by design)

Verdict: PASS
Notes (advisory only): The lone .spec/realization_hashes.json edit (run/2 hash 0415833->b3b822) is a pure line-position artifact, not a behavior change — the uv3 diff touches only orchestrator.ex's moduledoc and do_run; run/2's head and body are byte-unchanged. It was accepted via the new --accept-drift (honest dogfood) and tracked as specled_-o40. Session .jsonl not yet flushed to the projects dir at verify time; path recorded per convention.

TEST_CRITIC: PASS (run inline by orchestrator — critic-uv3 agent died on account session limit before reporting; orchestrator did not implement uv3, so reviewing its tests preserves separation).
Files reviewed: test/integration/drift_acceptance_test.exs, test/mix/tasks/spec_check_accept_drift_test.exs
Blocking findings: 0.
Load-bearing confirmation: real seams (real host MFA SpecLedEx.Coverage.default_artifact_path/0, real git repo, drift via real HashStore.write of sha256("wrong"), expected hash computed via real Binding.resolve+ApiBoundary.hash). Defect-1 fix proven by baseline-refresh assertion (drift_acceptance_test.exs:83-86); :info downgrade (:76); PASS single-shot (:79); defect-2 durability proven by self-heal non-accepting second run (:89-96); dangling NOT absorbed — run still fails + no hash committed (:137-149). No-leak-into-normal-runs covered by the without-flag assert_raise over a real drift=error config pin (spec_check_accept_drift_test.exs:49-53). No tautologies; hermetic per-test root; task test correctly reenable_tasks/drain_shell_messages.
Advisory (non-blocking): both files hardcode the same stable internal MFA (acceptable coupling).

STAGED (not merged). Branch specled_-oyg/guard-ergonomics = PR-1 (with oyg). uv3 commit 4968335 (was 95c5e37; replayed byte-identical over reworded oyg). Cold verify PASS + inline TEST_CRITIC PASS (0 blocking). PR-1 full merge gate GREEN (see oyg). CROSS-PR SEAM: lib/specled_ex/branch_check.ex is also edited by wr3 in PR-2 — whichever PR merges second must rebase over branch_check.ex. Follow-up specled_-o40 (api_boundary line-position leak) stands. Left in_progress pending PR merge.

ACCEPT-DRIFT SCOPING FIX added (commit edec840) — closes the critical-review silencing-coarser-than-healing defect (idioms M1 + testing M1 consensus + spec M1). Encodes silence-exactly-what-you-heal: orchestrator gate excludes dangling runs + exposes flat_tiers/0; branch_check downgrade scoped to Orchestrator.flat_tiers/0 tiers AND no-dangling; realized_by.drift_acceptance must tightened; 2 real-detector tests (mixed drift+dangling; impl-tier not silenced). Cold-verified VERIFY: PASS (silence==heal no hole, regression intact, tests real). NOTE: PR-1 branch is now stale — origin/main advanced to 8f7abd3 (0.3.2/0.3.3); needs rebase before merge (the gh_pages append_only error is purely that stale base).

title: intentional realization drift has no acceptance path
